title: lichen_sha256 does not validate input pointer
description:
Location: lichen_util.c:11-24

**What goes wrong:** lichen_sha256() passes input directly to tc_sha256_update() without NULL check. If caller passes NULL input with inlen > 0, TinyCrypt will dereference NULL. The tc_sha256_update() function may not have its own NULL check (implementation-dependent).

**Impact:** Crash on NULL input instead of clean -EINVAL return.

**Fix:** Add NULL check at function entry: if (input == NULL && inlen > 0) return -EINVAL.
